title: 「Be used to + 名詞／V-ing」句型
titleZh: 「Be used to + 名詞／V-ing」表示「習慣於……」
titleEn: Using Be used to for being accustomed to something

source.file: Sentence Structure 68 -「Be used to + 名詞／V-ing」表示「習慣於……」.pdf
omissions: English versions of Chinese-only Important Rules and Benefits explanations are faithful editorial translations.

formula: Subject + be + used to + noun / pronoun / V-ing + other information

formulas.formula: Subject + be + used to + noun / pronoun / V-ing + other information
Subject + be + not + used to + noun / V-ing
Be + subject + used to + noun / V-ing?

example: I am now used to the local culture.
exampleZh: 我現在已習慣當地文化。

examples.en: I am now used to the local culture.
examples.zh: 我現在已習慣當地文化。
examples.highlight: am now used to the local culture

examples.en: Tim is now used to talking to strangers.
examples.zh: Tim 現在已經習慣和陌生人說話。

meaning.zh: Be used to 表示某人已經習慣某件事或某項活動，現在或當時不再覺得陌生、奇怪或難以適應。

rules.en: In be used to, to is a preposition, so it is followed by a noun, pronoun or V-ing form.
rules.zh: 在 be used to 中，to 是介詞而不是不定詞標記，因此後面應接名詞、代名詞或 V-ing。
examples: She is used to working late.
She is used to the noise.

rules.en: Change the verb be to agree with the subject and time.
rules.zh: Be 動詞要配合主語和時間改變：現在使用 am、is 或 are；過去使用 was 或 were；將來使用 will be。
examples: They will be used to it.

rules.en: Place not after the verb be to form a negative sentence.
rules.zh: 否定句使用主語 + be + not + used to + 名詞／V-ing。
examples: I am not used to working at night.

rules.en: Place the verb be before the subject to form a question.
rules.zh: 問句把 be 動詞放在主語之前。
examples: Are you used to speaking in public?

rules.en: Be used to + noun / V-ing means being accustomed to something; used to + base verb describes a past habit or state.
rules.zh: Be used to + 名詞／V-ing 表示習慣某事；used to + 動詞原形表示過去經常做某事或過去的狀態。
examples: Tim is used to talking to strangers.
Tim used to talk to strangers every day.

rules.en: Be used to describes the state of already being accustomed; get used to describes the process of becoming accustomed.
rules.zh: Be used to 表示已經習慣的狀態；get used to 表示由不習慣逐漸變成習慣的過程。
examples: I am used to the new culture now.
It is difficult to get used to another culture.

rules.en: Do not confuse be used to + noun / V-ing with the passive be used to + base verb, meaning ‘be employed for a purpose’.
rules.zh: 不要把表示「習慣於」的 be used to + 名詞／V-ing，與表示「被用來」的被動語態 be used to + 動詞原形混淆。
examples: This knife is used to cut bread.

benefits.en: It clearly shows that something no longer feels unfamiliar.
benefits.zh: 這個句型可以直接說明一個人已適應某個環境、活動或生活方式。

benefits.en: It is useful for describing adjustment to a new school, job, culture, schedule, transport or lifestyle.
benefits.zh: 你可以使用這個句型談論新學校、新工作、新文化、工作時間、交通方式和生活習慣。

benefits.en: It can describe both things with nouns and activities with V-ing forms.
benefits.zh: 使用名詞可以描述已習慣的事物；使用 V-ing 可以描述已習慣進行的活動。

benefits.en: Changing the verb be lets you describe being accustomed in the present, past or future.
benefits.zh: 只要改變 be 動詞，便可以說明現在、過去或將來是否習慣某事。

benefits.en: It can replace a longer explanation with a more direct and natural sentence.
benefits.zh: 這個句型能以較直接的方式表達某事已不再陌生，適合自然的說話和寫作。

sourceOmissions: English versions of Chinese-only Important Rules and Benefits explanations are faithful editorial translations.

en: Rewrite each sentence using be used to + noun or V-ing without changing its meaning.
The first word of each answer has been provided.
zh: 使用 be used to + 名詞或 V-ing 改寫以下句子，並保持原意不變。
每題已提供答案的第一個字。

questions.prompt: Waking up at six feels normal to me now.
questions.promptZh: 現在六時起床對我來說已經很平常。
questions.answer: I am used to waking up at six.
questions.answerZh: 我已習慣在六時起床。
questions.highlight: I am used to waking up at six.

questions.prompt: Traffic noise no longer bothers Ella.
questions.promptZh: 交通噪音已不再令艾拉感到困擾。
questions.answer: Ella is used to traffic noise.
questions.answerZh: 艾拉已習慣交通噪音。
questions.highlight: Ella is used to traffic noise.

questions.prompt: Eating dinner late feels normal to us.
questions.promptZh: 較晚吃晚飯對我們來說很平常。

questions.highlight: The students are used to speaking English in class.

questions.prompt: Working at night is normal for this nurse.
questions.promptZh: 夜間工作對這名護士來說很平常。
questions.answer: This nurse is used to working at night.

questions.highlight: This nurse is used to working at night.

questions.answer: Mia is used to carrying a laptop to school.

questions.highlight: Ben is used to the strong taste of black coffee.

questions.promptZh: 莎拉在繁忙的咖啡店工作時為甚麼不會分心？那裏的噪音對她來說很熟悉。
questions.answer: Sara is used to the noise in a busy café.

questions.highlight: Sara is used to the noise in a busy café.

questions.answer: Daniel is used to starting work at seven.

questions.answer: Chloe is used to hot summers.

questions.prompt: The smell of paint has become familiar to the workers.

questions.prompt: Does speaking in front of large groups feel normal to you?

questions.answer: Are you used to speaking in front of large groups?

questions.prompt: When he lived in London, rainy mornings felt normal to Ethan.
questions.promptZh: 伊森住在倫敦時，下雨的早晨對他來說很平常。

questions.prompt: At that time, sharing a desk did not feel strange to me.
questions.promptZh: 當時，與別人共用書桌對我來說並不奇怪。
questions.answer: I was used to sharing a desk at that time.

questions.highlight: I was used to sharing a desk at that time.

questions.promptZh: 辦公室搬遷前，在細小房間工作對職員來說很平常。
questions.answer: Before the office moved, the staff were used to working in a small room.

questions.prompt: Handling customer complaints had become normal to Olivia after several years in customer service.
questions.promptZh: 在顧客服務工作數年後，處理顧客投訴對奧莉花來說已變得很平常。
questions.answer: Olivia was used to handling customer complaints after several years in customer service.
questions.answerZh: 在顧客服務工作數年後，奧莉花已習慣處理顧客投訴。

questions.promptZh: 長途火車旅程對你的父母來說平常嗎？
questions.answer: Were your parents used to long train journeys?

questions.highlight: Were your parents used to long train journeys?

questions.answer: The manager was used to starting work before sunrise.

questions.answer: Henry is used to answering questions in English.

questions.highlight: Henry is used to answering questions in English.

questions.answer: The residents are used to aircraft noise after living beside the airport for years.
questions.answerZh: 在機場旁居住多年後，居民已習慣飛機噪音。
questions.highlight: The residents are used to aircraft noise after living beside the airport for years.

questions.highlight: The hospital staff are used to working through public holidays.

questions.answer: The teacher is used to managing forty students at once.

questions.answer: The flight attendants are used to giving clear instructions even during emergencies.
questions.answerZh: 機艙服務員已習慣即使在緊急情況下也清楚發出指示。
questions.highlight: The flight attendants are used to giving clear instructions even during emergencies.

questions.prompt: The villagers had walked to the well to collect water every day throughout their lives, so the journey felt ordinary.
questions.promptZh: 村民一生每天都步行到水井取水，因此那段路程對他們來說很平常。
questions.answer: The villagers were used to walking to the well to collect water every day.
questions.answerZh: 村民已習慣每天步行到水井取水。
questions.highlight: The villagers were used to walking to the well to collect water every day.

questions.prompt: Will the early winter sunsets feel normal to Lena after another year in the north?
questions.promptZh: 莉娜在北方再生活一年後，會覺得冬季提早日落很平常嗎？
questions.answer: Will Lena be used to the early winter sunsets after another year in the north?
questions.answerZh: 莉娜在北方再生活一年後，會習慣冬季提早日落嗎？
questions.highlight: Will Lena be used to the early winter sunsets after another year in the north?

questions.prompt: Moving between time zones once exhausted the pilots, but frequent international flights have made it feel normal.
questions.promptZh: 穿梭不同時區曾令機師十分疲累，但頻繁的國際航班已令這件事變得平常。
questions.answer: After many international flights, the pilots are now used to moving between time zones, although it once exhausted them.
questions.answerZh: 經歷多次國際航班後，機師現在已習慣穿梭不同時區，儘管這件事曾令他們十分疲累。
questions.highlight: After many international flights, the pilots are now used to moving between time zones, although it once exhausted them.
